title: AssessmentReport
description: STORY-030.3: output of the Assessor agent. The Assessor authors concrete acceptance tests from the Planning-authored acceptance_intent, runs them against the delivered result, and emits a satisfaction verdict with evidence. The Assessor writes acceptance TESTS only — never product code — and never authors a pass verdict without running the tests (the verdict is derived from results).

authored_tests.description: Concrete acceptance tests authored by the Assessor from the intent. Every path must be a test file, never product code.

results.description: Per-test run result. The verdict is computed from these, not asserted by the model.

verdict.description: pass iff every intent behaviour has at least one authored test and all results passed.

evidence.description: Human-readable evidence lines backing the verdict.

assessor_model.description: Model that ran the Assessor; cross-model from the Developer by default.
